title: BEM-550.4 force role orchestrator test
objective:
Run script:
"""
import os, json, subprocess
from pathlib import Path
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state=Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json'); state.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
cycle='bem550-4-live-test-force'
def append(rec):
    with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(json.dumps(rec,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
append({'record_type':'curator_intake','cycle_id':cycle,'trace_id':'bem550_4_live_test_force','source':'gpt','task_type':'development','title':'BEM-550.4 live test','objective':'route to analyst','status':'completed','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:33 (UTC+3)'})
append({'record_type':'curator_assignment','cycle_id':cycle,'source':'curator','from_role':'curator','to_role':'role_orchestrator','status':'completed','decision':'submit_to_orchestrator','reason':'test','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:33 (UTC+3)'})
os.environ['CYCLE_ID']=cycle
script=Path('scripts/role_orchestrator_decide.py')
if script.exists():
    subprocess.run(['python3',str(script)],check=True)
rows=[]
for line in transport.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines():
    if line.strip():
        try: rows.append(json.loads(line))
        except Exception: pass
matches=[r for r in rows if r.get('cycle_id')==cycle and r.get('record_type')=='role_orchestrator_decision']
last=matches[-1] if matches else {}
ok=last.get('to_role')=='analyst' and last.get('status')=='completed'
blocker=None if ok else {'code':'ROLE_ORCHESTRATOR_LIVE_TEST_FAILED','last':last}
report=reports/'bem550_4_role_orchestrator_live_test.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-550.4 | Role-Orchestrator Live Workflow Test | '+('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER')+'\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 15:33 (UTC+3)\n\n## Result\nrole_orchestrator_decision routed curator_assignment development task to analyst.\n\n## Last decision\n```json\n'+json.dumps(last,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n```\n\n## Blocker\n'+('null' if ok else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+'\n')
proof=proofs/'bem550_4_role_orchestrator_live_test_force.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-550.4 '+('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER')+': to_role='+str(last.get('to_role'))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(transport),str(state),str(report),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-550.4 role-orchestrator live test explicit artifacts created')
"""
